default.title: Obtain the Sinner
default.text: Well now, don't you look smart, kid! Another one from Fraser, I reckon? What brings you to this old woman? If you're not in a hurry, pull up a crate, and I'll get the tea on.

default.title: Raise to Phase 1
default.text: Hyenas aren't picky. Whoever needs to go down, goes down.

default.title: Raise to Phase 3
default.text: You all call me "Granny," so it's my job to be out front. I dare anyone to try and hurt my family; they'll have to answer to me and my rifle!

default.title: Level Start
default.text: What the hyena marks, she never loses.

default.title: Victory
default.text: Target's down. If I head back now, I can still make it in time to bake treats for the kids.

default.title: Lose Battles
default.text: ******* vermin. Skulking in the shadows with your dirty tricks. Mark my words, I'll put a bullet in every last one of you.

default.title: Ultimate Skill
default.text: On my shot!

default.title: Die in Battles
default.text: Finally... I'm coming to meet you lot...

default.title: Greeting
default.text: You're back? Just in time. I've got a pot of soup going. Sit down and have a bowl before you run off again. No matter how busy you are, you can't work on an empty stomach.

default.title: Conversation 1
default.text: Nothing beats the satisfaction of fixing things: an old fan, a radio, a broken toy... Spending hours tinkering until they're spinning and humming again, that's what brings me peace of mind. For old folks like us, just being able to keep moving is what matters most.

default.title: Conversation 2
default.text: Honestly, when I was young, thinking just wasn't my thing. All that talk of plans and schemes? Gave me a headache. But later on, life left me no choice. I started reading, asking questions... Heh. All that stuff that used to stress me out, I ended up figuring it out the hard way.

default.title: Conversation 3
default.text: Most folks stare into the distance and just see the dark. Me? I can track a target's breath, catch every twitch. In this sniper game, good aim's a given. It's the steel nerves, the sharp eyes, and the quick reflexes that separate the pros from the dead. Hesitate for half a second? Trust me, you won't be the one watching the enemy drop.

default.title: Special Conversation 1
default.text: You're less of a handful than all the other brats I know, kid. At least you won't start a war over the last dinner roll... Then again, all that bickering and raising hell? That's what makes this place feel like a real family. When the chips are down, I know I can trust every single one of them with my life.

default.title: Special Conversation 2
default.text: Look, I'm not the sentimental type. But I make a point to show up at their graves every year, share a drink, and catch them up. Having you here with me... well, it's like you're hearing it for them. They'd be happy about that.

default.title: Special Conversation 3
default.text: You see these stickers on my toolbox and rifle? All keepsakes from the kids. But if you ever left one for me... now that'd be really special. I'd have to show it off to everyone. Can you imagine? Telling them all that even the great Chief calls me "Granny."

default.title: Full Compliance
default.text: You're a good kid. I can still see that clear as day. When I'm too old to lift my rifle or turn a wrench, you'll be the one to pick it up. You'll keep these everyday folks safe, so they can live their lives in peace... Heh. Knowing that, I'll be able to rest easy.

default.title: Idle
default.text: Enough dawdling. Do it clean, like a trigger pull. Once you start, there's no backing down.

default.title: Annoyed
default.text: The hell are you doing? You got a lot of nerve, don't you?

default.title: Special Attention
default.text: Don't you worry. Even in the dead of night, your Granny's got eyes on you. Nothing's gonna get past me.

default.title: Dispatch
default.text: That valve on East Street acting up again? Perfect. I'll grab my tools to fix the drip... and swat a pest.

default.title: Dispatch Complete
default.text: Plumbing's sorted. Target's been handled. Picked up some useful intel while I was at it. All in all, a good run.

default.title: Level Up
default.text: Guess these old bones aren't ready for the scrap heap just yet.
